name: Spike
description: When any Energy Ally is Played: Gets +1Health.

name: Jazzy
description: When Played: Opponent draws a card.

name: Bloom Kitten
description: 1 Bloom When any Floral Ally is played: Gets +1 Bloom

name: Bloomer
description: Mezz only 2 Bloom

name: Overheater
description: Start of Round: If this has more than 6Health, gives +1Health to surrounding Allies then does 2 damage to itself.

name: Branehart
description: Penthouse only When Played and When you gain a card from an Ally: Zaps 3 of your opponent’s Novas. (1/Round)

name: Bloom Cat
description: 2 Bloom When Played: Spawns a Bloom Kitten on the highest % spot.

name: Bloomshooter
description: Mezz only When Played: Gives all Allies +2 Bloom. When any Ally is Played: Gives that Ally +1 Bloom. When Energized: Gives all Allies +1Health.

name: Mopheous
description: Penthouse only When Played and Start of Round: Gives all Allies +1Health. When any Ally is Played: Gives that Ally +1Health.

name: Mega Joe
description: Penthouse only When Played: Spawns 2 Joes on the highest % spots. Start of Energizing and When Destroyed: Spawns a Joe on the highest % spot.

name: Dynamo
description: When Played and When opponent plays any Power: Gives itself +2Health, then surrounding Allies +1Health.

name: Snapper
description: Basement only When Energized and When Destroyed: Does 1 damage to all Enemies.

name: Bomber
description: Mezz only When Energized and When Destroyed: Does 1 damage to surrounding Enemies.

name: Executioner
description: Start of Energizing: Does 2 damage to Enemies below it in its column. When Played in Mezz or Penthouse: Gets +1Health.

name: Rat-A-Pult
description: Basement only When Played: Spawns a random Rat-A-Baby (no PH). Start of Energizing: Does 1 damage to Enemies in its column, then spawns a random Rat-A-Baby (no PH).

name: Nightswipe
description: When Played, Start of Round, and When Destroyed: Does 1 damage to Enemies in its row.

name: Sideswipe
description: When Played: Glitches Enemies in its row then does 2 damage to them. When Any Cyber Ally is Played: Deletes Enemies in its row with 1Health.

name: Corruptor
description: When Played and Start of Round: Glitches surrounding Enemies, then does 1 damage to surrounding Enemies.

name: Bruiser
description: Lobby or Mezz When Played: Does 1 damage to random Enemies 3 times. When Energized: Does 1 damage to random Enemies 4 times.

name: Telepath
description: Basement or Penthouse When Played and Start of Round: Adds 1 coin to your Bank and draws a card.

name: Negatron
description: When Energized: Does 3 damage to itself. When Played, Start of Round, and When Destroyed: Adds a Transporter to your hand.

name: Rachelle
description: When Played and When any Boom Ally does damage: Adds a Slicer to your hand (1/Round). When you play a Boom Power: Gets +1Health.

name: Rover
description: When Played: Spawns 2 Obstructors on highest % spots. Start of Energizing: Moves to the highest % spot (if higher). When this Moves: Gains 2Health.

name: Brainiac
description: Basement or Penthouse When Played and Start of Round: Adds a random Superpower to your hand.

name: Iceman
description: When Played before Start of Energizing: Suspends the column to its left. When anything else Suspends 1 or more columns: Gains 2Health

name: Reaper
description: Basement only When Played before Start of Energizing: Overrides its column to the Basement.

name: Dreamkiller
description: When Played and Start of Energizing: Moves Enemies in its column to lowest % spots, then moves to highest % spot in its column.

name: Trasher
description: When Played and Start of Energizing: Does 2 damage to surrounding Enemies, then spawns a random Rat-A-Baby.

name: Regan
description: When Destroyed: Spawns 2 Snakeskins on the highest % spots (no Penthouse).

name: Khrys
description: When Destroyed: Spawns a Flutter in its place. When Damaged: Transforms into a Flutter.

name: Splyt
description: When Played: Spawns a Splyt in the Basement of its column. Start of Round: Spawns a Splyt in the Lobby of its column.

name: Sprynk
description: When Played: Transforms Enemies in its row into Snakeskins.

name: One Cent
description: When Played and When Destroyed: Adds a random 1coin Friend to your hand.

name: Minerva
description: Basement or Penthouse When Played, When you play any Power (1/Round), and When Destroyed: Adds a random Power to your hand.

name: Bandit
description: When Played before Start of Energizing: Suspends its column. When anything Suspends 1 or more columns: Gains 1Health

name: Miniswipe
description: When Played and When any Cyber Ally is Played: Does 1 damage to Enemies next to it.

name: Sarge
description: When Played: Gets +1Health for each other Ally. When any Moxie Ally is played: Gets +1Health.

name: The Muscle
description: When Played: Does 2 damage to Enemies in its column, then 1 damage to Enemies in the columns next to it.

name: Bloom King
description: 2 Bloom When Played and When Damaged: Gives Allies next to it +2Bloom, then does 2 damage to Enemies next to it, then spawns Seedlets there if empty.

name: Pearle
description: When Played: Adds a random Boom Power to your hand. When Energized: Does 1 damage to a random Enemy.

name: Sizzle
description: When Played: Does 1 damage to Enemies in its row and column then moves to a random spot. Start of Energizing if in the Penthouse: Moves to the highest % spot.

name: Volata
description: When opponent plays any Power: Gets +3Health (1/Round).

name: Glitchi
description: When Played: Glitches surrounding Enemies.

name: Remover
description: When Played and When Destroyed: Deletes Enemies next to it with 2Health or less.

name: Hackmaster
description: Penthouse only When Played and Start of Round: Hacks a random Enemy with 3Health or less.

name: Barber
description: Start of Energizing: Does 1 damage to Enemies in its column.

name: Qadara
description: When Played: Transforms Allies next to it up 2coin. When any Magic Ally is Played: Transforms Allies next to it up 1coin (1/Round). When Destroyed: Respawns in the same spot.

name: Snakedini
description: When any Magic Ally is Played: This Transforms into a random 2Coin Ally. When Destroyed: Spawns a Snakeskin in its place.

name: Spelzz
description: Penthouse only When Played: Spawns a Khrys on the highest % spot. When any Spot is Energized: Transforms any Ally there up 1coin.

name: Bowa
description: Lobby or Mezz When Damaged: Gets +3Health. Start of Round:: Does 2 damage to itself.

name: Ray
description: Basement only When Played and Start of Round: Gives Lobby Allies in its column and columns next to it +2Health, then spawns DCs there.

name: Bloom Queen
description: 2 Bloom When Played: Spawns a Bloom Cat on the highest % spot. When Energized and When Destroyed: Gives all Allies +1Health and +1 Bloom.

name: Beebie
description: Mezz only When Energized and When Any Boom Ally is Played: Does 1 damage to a random Enemy.

name: IP
description: When Played: Draws a card.

name: Melder
description: When Played, When Energized, and When any Cosmic Ally is Played: Zaps 1 of opponent's Novas.

name: Waterer
description: When Played: Gives +2 Bloom to surrounding Allies. When any Ally Blooms or gains Bloom: Adds a Growth Spray to your hand (1/Round).

name: Destroyer
description: Lobby or Mezz When Played, When Energized, and When Destroyed: Destroys a random Enemy.

name: Mindwave
description: When Energized: Instead of collecting Novas, Zaps opponent's Novas equal to its health.

name: Obstructor
description: Can't be Transformed Start of Energizing: Disappears unless it spawned after Start of Energizing.

name: Time Guru
description: When Played, Start of Energizing, and When Destroyed: Fractures Surrounding Enemies

name: Time Trooper
description: When Played and Start of Round: Fractures Enemies next to it.

name: Attractor
description: When Played before Start of Energizing: Overrides its column to its spot.

name: Disruptor
description: When Played and Start of Round: Spawns Obstructors next to it.

name: Papercut
description: Penthouse only When Played, Start of Round, and Start of Energizing: Does 1 damage to a random Enemy.

name: Felena
description: Penthouse only When Played: Spawns 2 Bloom Kittens on the highest % spots. Start of Round and When Destroyed: Spawns a Bloom Kitten on the highest % spot.

name: Weade
description: 1 Bloom Start of Round: Gains +1 Bloom. When Destroyed: Spawns a Weade on the highest % spot.

name: Seedlet
description: When Energized: Gives +1Health to Allies next to it.

name: Fil
description: When this gains Health and When Destroyed: Gives itself and all surrounding Allies +1Health (1/Round).

name: Blazer
description: Lobby or Mezz When Destroyed: Does 1 damage to surrounding Enemies, then spawns a random Blazer. Start of Round: Destroys itself if not spawned this round.

name: Scifon
description: Penthouse only When Opponent Would Collect Nova From Energizing: This takes damage instead, then Collects 1 Nova.

name: Giving Tree
description: Lobby or Mezz Can't collect Novas Start of Energizing and When Damaged: Gives surrounding Allies +2 Bloom, then spawns a random Seedlet in the Lobby or Mezz.

name: Sparki
description: When Played (1/Round) and Start of Energizing: Unglitches surrounding Allies, then triggers their When Played abilities.

name: Gemma
description: Penthouse only When Played: Spawns a Snakeskin on the highest % spot. When any Ally is Destroyed: Spawns a Snakeskin in its spot.

name: Cosmicosi
description: When Destroyed: Draws a card and adds 1coin to Opponent's bank.

name: Oddball
description: Lobby or Mezz When Played, When Energized and Start of Round: If its Health is odd, does 1 damage to itself and surrounding Allies. If even, does 2 damage to surrounding Enemies.

name: Ecko
description: Penthouse only When any Ally is Played: Re-Trigger that Ally’s When Played abilities.

name: Rerun
description: When Played: Gives all other Allied Reruns +1Health. Start of Round (if not spawned this round): Spawns a random Rerun.

name: Air Attack
description: Do 3 damage to any Mezz or Penthouse Enemy, then do 1 damage to other Mezz and Penthouse Enemies.

name: Slicer
description: Do 2 damage to any Enemy.

name: Cannon
description: Do 3 damage to any Enemy. Add a Cannonball to your hand.

name: Spear Attack
description: Pick a column. Do 2 damage to Enemies there and the column to its right.

name: EMP
description: Glitch all Enemies then do 1 damage to all Enemies. Draw a card.

name: Laser Beam
description: Delete Lobby Enemies with 2Health or less, then do 2 damage to Lobby Enemies.

name: Flytrap
description: Pick a spot. Do 4 damage to an Enemy there, then 3 damage to Enemies next to it.

name: Lightning Storm
description: Do 2 damage to all Enemies, then spawn a DC on the highest % spot.

name: Growth Spray
description: Give any Ally +2Health.

name: High Roller
description: Give Penthouse Allies +2Health, then do 3 damage to Penthouse Enemies. Draw a card.

name: Subwoofer
description: Give Basement Allies +2Health. Draw a card.

name: Lightspeed
description: Give any Ally +6Health. Draw a card.

name: Pizza Party
description: Pick a column. Spawn 2 Rat-A-Babies (highest %) there or next to it. Give Allies there +3Health and Allies next to it +1Health. Draw a card.

name: High Voltage
description: Spawn a DC on the highest % spot, then give all Allies +3Health.

name: Antivirus
description: Delete any Enemy with 2Health or less.

name: Contamination
description: Glitch any Enemy then do 1 damage to it. Add a random 2Health or less Cyber Friend to your hand.

name: Terminate
description: Pick a spot. Delete any Enemy there, then spawn a Glitchi there.

name: Arson
description: Pick a column. Do 4 damage to Enemies there, then 3 damage to Enemies next to it, then spawn 3 Rat-A-Babies on the highest % spots in those columns.

name: Strategic Shift
description: Reposition any Enemy. Draw a card.

name: Brainstorm
description: Zap 2 of your opponent's Novas. Draw a card.

name: Zapling Gun
description: Do 2 damage to any Enemy. Zap 4 of your opponent's Novas.

name: Piggy Bank
description: Get 1 extra coin at the start of every Round.

name: Double Trouble
description: Add 2 random Superpowers to your hand.

name: Interference
description: Suspend any column.

name: Transporter
description: Reposition any Ally and give it +1Health.

name: Makeover
description: Transform any Ally up 1coin.  Draw a card.

name: Spell Ya Later
description: Transform any Enemy down 3coin. Draw a card.

name: Venomous
description: Transform any Enemy with 3Health or less into an Allied Regan. Add a Makeover to your hand.

name: Sawblade
description: Do 2 damage to any Enemy and 1 damage to all other Enemies.

name: The Scroll
description: Transform any Ally up 3coin and spawn a random copy of the new Ally OR Transform any Enemy into an Allied Khrys (Regan if PH).

name: Splitter
description: Glitch any Enemy, then do damage to it equal to half its Health rounded up. Add a Glitchi to your hand.

name: Bounce Pad
description: Eject any Ally or Enemy. Draw 2 cards.

name: Campfire
description: Pick a spot. Do 2 damage to any Enemy there, then give surrounding Allies +1Health. Add a random 3Coin or less Moxie Ally with a damage ability to your hand.

name: Direct Hit
description: Destroy any Basement Enemy.

name: Mini Boost
description: Give any Ally +1Health.  Draw a card.

name: Generator
description: Spawn a random DC in the Lobby or Mezz. Add a random 2coin or less Energy Power to your hand.

name: Jolt
description: Pick a spot. Spawn a Spike there, then spawn a Spike on the highest % spot. Add a Spike to your hand.

name: Low Voltage
description: Give any Lobby Ally +3Health and other Lobby Allies +1Health.  Draw a card.

name: Fertilizer
description: Give all Allies +1Health. Draw a card.

name: Mezzagrowth
description: Give any Mezz Ally +2Health and other Mezz Allies +1Health. Draw a card.

name: Seed Packet
description: Give any Ally +2 Bloom and all other Allies +1 Bloom. Draw a card.

name: Slingshot
description: Destroy any Enemy with 5Health or more.

name: Territorial
description: Pick a column. Destroy Enemies there, then fill empty spots there with a set of Moxie Allies.

name: Grenado
description: Destroy any Lobby or Mezz Enemy.

name: Reboot
description: Reset any Ally to its starting state (no When Played ability). Draw a card.

name: Disintegrate
description: Delete any Enemy with 4Health or less. Add an Antivirus to your hand.

name: Mega Hack
description: Hack any Enemy.

name: Favoritism
description: Pick a column. Give Allies there +3Health and do 3 damage to Enemies there. Draw a card.

name: Get Out!
description: Do 1 damage to any Enemy, then it moves to a random spot in its row. Spawn an Allied Rat-A-Baby in its place.

name: Megamorph
description: Pick a column. Transform Enemies there down 2coin, then Transform Allies there up 2coin, then spawn a Snakedini on the highest % spot in that column.

name: Reflection
description: While In Hand: This becomes the last Friend played from either player's Hand. It keeps this ability.

name: Shrink
description: Set any Enemy's Health to 1. Add a Reflection to your hand.

name: Bloomseed
description: Give any Ally +2Health and +3 Bloom. Draw a card.

name: Pollination
description: Pick a spot. If empty, spawn a Seedlet there. Give all Allies +1Health and +1 Bloom, then spawn a Waterer on the highest % spot.

name: Explosion
description: Do 4 damage to any Enemy then 3 damage to random Enemies 3 times.

name: Megabomb
description: Do 9 damage to any Enemy and 1 damage to all other Enemies.

name: Prepare
description:
Draw 2 cards.
If Round 10 or later, opponent also draws a card.

name: Chain Reaction
description: Give any Ally +1Health per Enemy & +3 extra Health, then give all Enemies +1Health.

name: Universal
description: Get 1 extra coin every Start of Round. Zap 1 opponent Nova. Add a random Superpower to your hand. Spawn an IP on highest % spot.

name: Escape Pod
description: Eject any Ally and add 2 Coins to your Bank. It stays your turn.

name: Time Delay
description: Fracture any Enemy with 4Health or less. Add a 3coin or less Distortion Power to your hand.

name: Time Loop
description: Reposition any Ally or Enemy. Spawn an Allied Time Trooper in its place.

name: Double Dip
description: Pick a column. Override that column and the one to its right to the Basement. Draw a card.

name: Swap
description: Swap an Ally or Enemy with another Ally or Enemy. Draw a card.

name: Disturbance
description: Pick a row. Spawn Obstructors in empty spots there. Draw a card. Add 2 Obstructors to Opponent's hand.

name: Cannonball
description: Do 1 damage to any Enemy. Draw a card.

name: Gooplicate
description: Transform any Ally down 1coin, then spawn a random copy of the new Ally.

name: Bloomshine
description: Pick a spot. Give Allies there and surrounding +1 Bloom, then +Health equal to their Bloom. Draw a card.

name: Time Gate
description: Pick an Enemy. Fracture all Enemies in that row, then move that Enemy to the lowest % spot. It stays your turn.
